sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 75

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 75:1
items.html: (to the question) The discernment of the Malchut or the Yesod, where the place of the Zivug [coupling] is — that is, the discernment of the Masach [screen] and the corrected Aviut [coarseness] there, from which, by the Returning Light rising from the Masach, all the Kelim [vessels] and Lights of that Partzuf spread — is titled the reckoning [Cheshbon] and Gematria of the Partzuf, namely the Gematria of the HaVaYaH: AB or SAG, etc. All of these indicate the discernments of the Masach and the Aviut corrected in the Masach of that degree.
